author: ShadyTidus
name: ShadyAlts
short: Alt account tracking and network visualization
description: Track alt accounts with bidirectional linking, network visualization, and join/leave notifications. Supports both in-server members and out-of-server users by ID. Features configurable moderator roles and reason tracking.
install_msg:
ShadyAlts installed!

Commands (slash only):
- `/alt` - Manage alts for server members
- `/altid` - Manage alts by user ID
- `/altset` - Configure settings

Setup:
1. `/altset channel` - Set mod log channel
2. `/altset addrole` - Add mod roles (optional)
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs of linked alt accounts, the moderator who linked them, reasons, and timestamps.
